purpose: Track candidate synonymous, equivalent, overlapping, adjacent, broader, narrower, contradictory, and unresolved relationships discovered from formalized origins.
origin_boundary: Origins must be formalized artifacts such as formalism repositories, standards documents, academic papers, technical reports, public specifications, schemas, reference implementations, policy frameworks, regulatory guidance, public ontologies, or stable whitepapers. Social-media comments may be leads but are not acceptable origins.
next_action: Populate candidates from periodic searches only when a formalized origin is identified.
